arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho has left clear Man United blueprint for three newest first team players
arts.sum: Similarly to three new Manchester United teammates, Alejandro Garnacho took his first steps with the Premier League giants in the EFL Trophy.

arts.ttl: 5 things spotted from Man Utd training as Marcus Rashford responds before FC Twente test
arts.sum: Manchester United begin their Europa League campaign against FC Twente on Wednesday - and their training session offered plenty of hints towards their state of mind

arts.ttl: Doncaster Rovers vs Manchester United U21s live updates and team news from EFL Trophy fixture
arts.sum: Man Utd U21s play Doncaster Rovers in the EFL Trophy on Tuesday and we'll bring you live updates from the game.

arts.ttl: Revealed: A Man United fan convicted of battery on a City supporter was arrested FIVE DAYS later for tragedy chanting against Liverpool at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Thug Harry Thorley appeared before magistrates in London on August 27 after he walked up to the City fan in a car park at the Community Shield curtain-raiser and punched him in the face.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag hits back at Marcus Rashford suggestions after Manchester United rotation
arts.sum: Red Devils could only manage goalless draw at Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Andre Onana 'happy' to be back alongside Matthijs de Ligt at Man Utd
arts.sum: Manager Erik ten Hag, who managed Onana, De Ligt, Lisandro Martinez and Noussair Mazraoui at Ajax, has also been able to name the same back four and goalkeeper for three league games in a row. Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is "happy" to be backing playing with former Ajax teammate Matthijs de Ligt, who has established himself as a starter in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: 2025 target Xavi Simons is starting to worry
arts.sum: The 21-year-old has no future at PSG and last season's form made him one of Europe's most sought-after players, so it came as a major surprise when he decided to rejoin Leipzig. Last term, Simons was one of Europe's most creative and devastating players, notching 10 goals and 15 assists across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag reignites Jamie Redknapp row after Marcus Rashford theory
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit Jamie Redknapp has found himself in the crosshairs again, with Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag still annoyed at his comments on Marcus Rashford

arts.ttl: Man United Luke Shaw transfer replacements after injury setback with three-month no-brainer
arts.sum: Manchester United injury news as Luke Shaw setback leaves Erik ten Hag no choice in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Noussair Mazraoui comments on leaving Bayern Munich for Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Noussair Mazraoui comments on the reasons behind his decision to leave Bayern Munich for Old Trafford during the summer transfer window.
